title: Set timeline based on week selections

posts.author: HarmLommers (Harm Lommers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’m looking for a way to let our team easily enter their planning for several weeks ahead, by entering how many hours per project/activity will be needed (on a weekly level).

I thought I could use the Week column for this, but apparently you cannot use it for the workload view.
So, now I’m trying to update the Timeline based on the Week that was selected.
But actually I don’t see any automation options for this. Does anyone know a way to achieve this?

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@HarmLommers
